block_00: Trade the ups and downs of the price
block_01: This week, we are bringing back one of last year’s most popular articles in order to refresh the ZigZag indicator in your memory.
block_02: Recognizing the trend among the price noise is a key ability for traders: this way you can catch the best moment to enter or exit a deal with maximum benefit. The ZigZag indicator is built specifically with the purpose to eliminate the price noise, for smoother indications of the trend direction.
block_03: ZigZag is a great complementary tool that can be combined with many different indicators. Check the article for a detailed explanation on how to set it up and apply in trading.
